description: A node in a Godot scene tree

name.description: Node name in the scene tree. If omitted, derived from type.

type.description: Godot class name, e.g. CharacterBody2D, Sprite2D, Control. Must be a Node subclass.

script.description: res:// path to a GDScript or C# script to attach.

properties.description: Node properties as key-value pairs. Values can be primitives or typed objects (see typed_value.schema.json).
